# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function adminDashboardReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

    $post = $_POST ?? [];

    $startDateRaw = trim((string)($post['start_date'] ?? ''));
    $endDateRaw   = trim((string)($post['end_date'] ?? ''));
    $statusRaw    = $post['status'] ?? null;
    $categoryRaw  = $post['category'] ?? null;

    $startDate = null;
    $endDate = null;

    if ($startDateRaw !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $startDateRaw);
        if ($dt && $dt->format('Y-m-d') === $startDateRaw) {
            $startDate = $dt->format('Y-m-d');
        }
    }

    if ($endDateRaw !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $endDateRaw);
        if ($dt && $dt->format('Y-m-d') === $endDateRaw) {
            $endDate = $dt->format('Y-m-d');
        }
    }

    $status = null;
    if (is_array($statusRaw)) {
        $status = array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', array_map('strval', $statusRaw)), static fn($v) => $v !== ''));
        if (!$status) $status = null;
    } else {
        $s = trim((string)$statusRaw);
        if ($s !== '') $status = $s;
    }

    $category = null;
    if (is_array($categoryRaw)) {
        $category = array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', array_map('strval', $categoryRaw)), static fn($v) => $v !== ''));
        if (!$category) $category = null;
    } else {
        $c = trim((string)$categoryRaw);
        if ($c !== '') $category = $c;
    }

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    if ($startDate !== null && $endDate !== null) {
        if ($startDate > $endDate) {
            [$startDate, $endDate] = [$endDate, $startDate];
        }
        $where[] = "r.created_at >= :start_dt AND r.created_at < DATE_ADD(:end_dt, INTERVAL 1 DAY)";
        $params[':start_dt'] = $startDate;
        $params[':end_dt']   = $endDate;
    } elseif ($startDate !== null) {
        $where[] = "r.created_at >= :start_dt";
        $params[':start_dt'] = $startDate;
    } elseif ($endDate !== null) {
        $where[] = "r.created_at < DATE_ADD(:end_dt, INTERVAL 1 DAY)";
        $params[':end_dt'] = $endDate;
    }

    $applyInOrEq = static function (string $column, $value, string $paramBase) use (&$where, &$params): void {
        if ($value === null) return;

        if (is_array($value)) {
            $ph = [];
            foreach ($value as $i => $v) {
                $key = ':' . $paramBase . '_' . $i;
                $ph[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $v;
            }
            if ($ph) {
                $where[] = $column . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ph) . ')';
            }
        } else {
            $key = ':' . $paramBase;
            $where[] = $column . ' = ' . $key;
            $params[$key] = $value;
        }
    };

    $applyInOrEq('r.status', $status, 'status');
    $applyInOrEq('r.category', $category, 'category');

    $whereSql = $where ? ('WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where)) : '';

    $sqlSummary = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
            SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS status_open,
            SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS status_closed,
            SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS status_pending,
            MIN(r.created_at) AS min_created_at,
            MAX(r.created_at) AS max_created_at
        FROM reports r
        $whereSql
    ";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlSummary);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    $stmt->execute();
    $summary = (array)$stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $sqlByStatus = "
        SELECT r.status, COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM reports r
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY r.status
        ORDER BY cnt DESC, r.status ASC
    ";
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlByStatus);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    $stmt->execute();
    $byStatus = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $sqlByCategory = "
        SELECT r.category, COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM reports r
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY r.category
        ORDER BY cnt DESC, r.category ASC
    ";
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlByCategory);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    $stmt->execute();
    $byCategory = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $sqlDaily = "
        SELECT DATE(r.created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM reports r
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY DATE(r.created_at)
        ORDER BY day ASC
    ";
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlDaily);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    $stmt->execute();
    $daily = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $page = isset($post['page']) ? max(1, (int)$post['page']) : 1;
    $perPage = isset($post['per_page']) ? (int)$post['per_page'] : 50;
    if ($perPage < 1) $perPage = 50;
    if ($perPage > 500) $perPage = 500;
    $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

    $allowedSort = [
        'created_at' => 'r.created_at',
        'status'     => 'r.status',
        'category'   => 'r.category',
        'id'         => 'r.id',
    ];
    $sortKey = (string)($post['sort'] ?? 'created_at');
    $sortCol = $allowedSort[$sortKey] ?? 'r.created_at';
    $dir = strtoupper((string)($post['dir'] ?? 'DESC'));
    $dir = ($dir === 'ASC') ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';

    $sqlRows = "
        SELECT
            r.id,
            r.created_at,
            r.status,
            r.category,
            r.amount,
            r.user_id
        FROM reports r
        $whereSql
        ORDER BY $sortCol $dir
        LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
    ";
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlRows);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $perPage, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $sqlCount = "
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM reports r
        $whereSql
    ";
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sqlCount);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    $stmt->execute();
    $total = (int)$stmt->fetchColumn();

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'start_date' => $startDate,
            'end_date'   => $endDate,
            'status'     => $status,
            'category'   => $category,
            'page'       => $page,
            'per_page'   => $perPage,
            'sort'       => $sortKey,
            'dir'        => $dir,
        ],
        'summary'    => $summary,
        'by_status'  => $byStatus,
        'by_category'=> $byCategory,
        'daily'      => $daily,
        'rows'       => $rows,
        'pagination' => [
            'total'       => $total,
            'page'        => $page,
            'per_page'    => $perPage,
            'total_pages' => $perPage > 0 ? (int)ceil($total / $perPage) : 0,
        ],
        'debug' => [
            'where_sql' => $whereSql,
            'params'    => $params,
        ],
    ];
}
